caption: The video features a graphic screen with a green and white background. On the left side, a green square contains the text "Fibonacci 24/7" and the name "Larry Pesavento." To the right, the logo "TFNN.com" is displayed above the phrase "EDUCATING INVESTORS." A blue and black banner across the middle contains the text "FIBONACCI 24/7" in a yellow font, followed by the name "Basil Chapman" and the smaller text "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022." As the sequence progresses, the graphics remain static until a sudden horizontal motion blur effect sweeps across the screen from left to right. By the final moment, the motion blur obscures the "Fibonacci 24/7" logo, the "TFNN.com" branding, and the left side of the banner, leaving only the right side of the banner with "Basil Chapman" and the date visible.
